blog.title: Stories & Insights
blog.subtitle: Tutorials, engineering deep-dives, and design thinking from our team.
blog.no_results_description: Try adjusting your search or filter to find what you're looking for.
blog.seo_description: Insights, tutorials, and updates from No Name Studio.

nav.no_matching_desc: Try another keyword, or search the library directly.

home.title: Find the show, choose the session, keep your seat.
home.subtitle: TicketRush handles reserved seating, real-time holds, and checkout countdowns so you can secure tickets the moment sales open.
home.hero_fallback_title: Your next night out starts here.
home.hero_fallback_subtitle: Search the catalog, pick a session, and keep your seats protected while you check out.
home.browse_catalog_venues: Browse the catalog for live venues
home.featured_subtitle: A small preview of the soonest live events. Use the catalog when you want filters, sorting, cities, and pagination.
home.featured_error: Featured events are temporarily unavailable. Browse the full catalog to keep exploring.
home.featured_curating: Curating the next drops for you.
home.featured_empty: New events are being prepared. Browse the full catalog for the latest releases.
home.organizer_title: Manage drops without pulling buyers out of flow.
home.organizer_subtitle: The console stays one step away for teams managing events, sessions, seat maps, and live sales.
home.hero_img_alt: Audience waiting for a live event
home.trust_attendees_desc: Reuse profiles when booking for a group.
home.trust_reserved_desc: Move straight from session to seat map.

events.title: Every live event, one search away.
events.subtitle: Filter by status, date, or keyword and jump straight into booking when sales are open.
events.no_results_title: No events match the current filters.
events.no_results_subtitle: Adjust the search criteria, remove some filters, or browse the full catalog.
events.catalog_subtitle: Search live shows, compare cities and dates, then choose the session that fits your plans.
events.search_events_placeholder: Search by event, venue, or city
events.no_match_desc: Try a broader search, another city, or reset filters to see every live event.

event_detail.select_session_desc: Choose a date and time to view available seats and book tickets.
event_detail.sessions_empty: Sessions will appear here once the organizer publishes the schedule.
event_detail.about_title: Choose the date that fits your plans.
event_detail.sessions_subtitle: Each session has its own start time, ticket releases, and seat map access.
event_detail.sessions_empty: Sessions will appear here once the organizer publishes the schedule.
event_detail.organizer_note_desc: Review session details before choosing seats.
event_detail.organizer_note_body: Ticket availability and seating are managed per session. Select a date above to continue with the correct schedule.
event_detail.ticket_releases_empty: Ticket releases will appear once sales are configured.
event_detail.schedule_coming_soon_desc: We do not have public sessions for this event yet. Check back soon for dates, ticket releases, and seat selection.
event_detail.trust_secure_checkout: Secure checkout and live seat availability
event_detail.session_sales_not_open: Sales have not opened for this session.
event_detail.ticket_releases_coming_soon_desc: Sales have not opened for this session yet. Check back soon for pricing and seat availability.

seats.seats_held_info: Seats are held for 10 minutes. Choose seats for this session before continuing to checkout.
seats.selection_summary_desc: Choose up to 10 seats, then continue straight to checkout.
seats.reserved_for_checkout: Reserved for checkout after you continue.
seats.pick_seats_prompt: Pick seats from the map to build your order.
seats.seats_taken_error: One or more selected seats were taken by another customer.
seats.seats_conflict_error: Some of the selected seats are no longer available. We refreshed the map for you.
seats.checkout_error: We could not open checkout. Please try again.
seats.floating_hold_note: {seats} · held for checkout after you continue

seatmap.title: Seat map
seatmap.admin_desc: Shared layout data powers this map and the venue editor, keeping section structure consistent.
seatmap.interactive_desc: Focus sections, inspect seats, and keep your selection in one stable checkout flow.
seatmap.preview_desc: Review live availability and pricing before entering the reservation flow.
seatmap.no_layout: Seat layout is not available yet.
seatmap.no_layout_desc: Ticket releases and live availability will appear here once inventory is published.
seatmap.click_to_inspect: Click a seat to inspect it
seatmap.desc_available_interactive: This seat can be added to the current checkout selection.
seatmap.desc_available: This seat can still be secured once you enter live selection.
seatmap.desc_locked: Another buyer is holding this seat during an active checkout window.
seatmap.desc_sold: This position has already been converted into a completed order.
seatmap.desc_unavailable: This location is currently not being released for public purchase.
seatmap.layout_empty_title: Seat layout is not available yet.
seatmap.layout_empty_desc: Ticket releases and live availability will appear here once inventory is published.

checkout.demo_note: This demo checkout does not connect to a live payment provider. Confirming the order finalizes your held seats and issues QR tickets immediately.
checkout.hold_expired_note: The hold expired. Return to the event and choose seats again.
checkout.hold_active_note: Seats remain reserved while this countdown is active.
checkout.session_time_tba: Session time will be announced by the organizer.
checkout.finish_order_title: Finish the order inside your hold window.
checkout.finish_order_desc: We use this information for the digital ticket payload and dashboard demographics. You can keep optional fields minimal if you prefer.
checkout.phone_desc: Optional. Useful for organizer outreach on schedule changes.
checkout.ticket_assignments_desc: Assign each ticket to your account, a saved attendee, or enter details manually.
checkout.auto_synced_note: Ticket holder details are automatically synced with the buyer details above.
checkout.save_as_attendee_desc: Save this person for faster checkout next time.
checkout.tickets_in_wallet: Your issued tickets are now available in your account wallet.
checkout.hold_expired_toast: Your seat hold has expired. Please return to the event and choose seats again.
checkout.order_confirm_error: We could not confirm the order

tickets.title: Your issued passes, ready whenever doors open.
tickets.subtitle: Every confirmed order lands here with its digital QR token and purchase metadata.
tickets.empty_title: Your first issued ticket will appear here.
tickets.empty_subtitle: Once you confirm a checkout, TicketRush stores the QR pass, seat assignment, and event timing in this wallet automatically.
tickets.detail_subtitle: Your digital pass is ready for entry. Keep this QR available at the door and review the event details below before arrival.
tickets.detail_qr_ready_desc: Keep this QR ready at the door. The essentials below match the pass details scanned by the venue team.
tickets.admission_doors_tba: Doors open time will be announced by the organizer.
tickets.admission_bring_qr: Bring this QR code and the attendee email used during checkout.
tickets.admission_staff_note: Venue staff may ask you to show both before entry.
tickets.missing_title: We could not find that ticket.
tickets.missing_subtitle: The pass may have been removed, or this link may not belong to your account.
tickets.empty_wallet_desc: This wallet stores the QR pass, seat assignment, and event timing.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Holds, payments, and upcoming event reminders.
notifications.empty_desc: We will show seat holds, successful payments, and event reminders here.
notifications.hold_expired_desc: Your seat hold for {event} expired, so the seats were released for other buyers.
notifications.payment_confirmed_desc: {event} tickets are ready in My Tickets.

waiting_room.title: Stay here while we pace access to the seat map.
waiting_room.subtitle: TicketRush is admitting customers in small batches so the inventory stays correct and the purchase flow feels stable.
waiting_room.status_note: Please keep this page open. We refresh your status automatically and will move you into the seat map once your window opens.
waiting_room.leave_error: We could not leave the queue right now
waiting_room.join_error: We could not join the waiting room. Please try again.
waiting_room.connection_error: We lost contact with the queue for a moment. We will keep retrying automatically.

auth.login_desc: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.2fa_desc: Enter the code from your authenticator app
auth.agree_terms: By signing in, you agree to our
auth.passkey_auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please ensure your passkey is set up correctly, or sign in with your password.
auth.oauth_url_invalid: Authentication completed but response URL was invalid. Please try again.
auth.oauth_timeout: OAuth session timed out or popup was closed. Please try again.
auth.oauth_failed: Unable to continue with provider right now. Please try again.
auth.register_desc: Enter your information to get started
auth.password_weak_note: Password must be strong to create an account
auth.agree_register_terms: By creating an account, you agree to our

passkey.dialog_desc: Create a passkey for faster and more secure authentication
passkey.what_is_desc: A passkey is a secure, passwordless way to sign in using your device's biometric authentication (fingerprint, face recognition) or security key.
passkey.later_note: You can create a passkey later in your account settings.

admin.dashboard_desc: Events, venues, and account activity in one place.
admin.dashboard_analytics_desc: Track revenue, listed capacity, active launches, and session timing without opening each event workspace.
admin.dashboard_total_revenue_desc: Confirmed checkout revenue across every tracked event.
admin.dashboard_seats_listed_desc: Reserved and general inventory generated from venue maps.
admin.dashboard_tickets_issued_desc: Digital passes created from completed buyer orders.
admin.dashboard_total_views_desc: Traffic tracking is ready for the dashboard once view events are stored.
admin.dashboard_performance_desc: Monthly confirmed revenue and issued tickets from checkout activity.
admin.dashboard_seat_mix_desc: Sold inventory compared with remaining listed seats.
admin.dashboard_active_listing_desc: Search events, inspect revenue, and jump into the event workspace.
admin.dashboard_empty_title: No events in the dashboard yet.
admin.dashboard_empty_desc: Create or publish an event to start seeing analytics here.
admin.dashboard_session_calendar_desc: Pick a day to inspect launches and sales status.
admin.dashboard_no_sessions_day_desc: Select a marked date to inspect selling windows, capacity, and revenue.
admin.cockpit_publish_backlog_has: Draft launches still need final pricing, seat verification, or publish approval.
admin.cockpit_publish_backlog_none: All tracked events are already live or complete.
admin.cockpit_live_programs_has: Published events are now available for seat, sales, and buyer operations review.
admin.cockpit_live_programs_none: No published events are currently tracked in the command center.
admin.cockpit_city_coverage_has: Venue blueprints are distributed across active city footprints for future launches.
admin.cockpit_city_coverage_none: Add venue blueprints to establish regional coverage for future events.
admin.stat_events_desc: Tracked launches in the admin catalog.
admin.stat_drafts_desc: Events still being prepared for launch.
admin.venue_largest_desc: {name} in {city} is currently the largest venue.
admin.venue_no_blueprints: Add venue blueprints to start tracking coverage.

waiting_room_settings.title: Waiting room
waiting_room_settings.desc: Activates automatically for any session once live demand reaches the global threshold.
waiting_room_settings.threshold_desc: Active queue passes plus active holds before buyers are paced.
waiting_room_settings.batch_size_desc: Number of buyers admitted on each queue cycle.
waiting_room_settings.window_seconds_desc: How long an admitted pass remains valid.
waiting_room_settings.session_note: Existing sessions use these settings immediately after save.
waiting_room_settings.update_failed: Failed to update waiting room settings

tasks.title: Background tasks
tasks.desc: Manually trigger system tasks that cannot run on a schedule in production.
tasks.release_holds_desc: Free seats from expired hold timers and recompute analytics for all events.
tasks.admit_queue_desc: Process the next admission batch for all queue-enabled events and expire stale entries.
tasks.seed_admin_desc: Create the default administrator account if it does not already exist.

admin.event_stat_occupancy_desc: {count} seats still open in the snapshot.
admin.event_chart_seat_status_desc: Current inventory split across available, held, and sold seats.
admin.event_chart_revenue_section_desc: Top performing sections by confirmed revenue.
admin.event_checklist_sales_window_fail: Set the commercial window in pricing.
admin.event_checklist_inventory_ok: {count} seat snapshots linked to this event.
admin.event_checklist_inventory_fail: Attach a venue blueprint to generate seats.

events.title: Events
events.desc: Track drafts, publish state, and launch activity.
events.catalog_desc: Events currently in the admin catalog.
events.drafts_desc: Events still being shaped before launch.
events.live_desc: Public events that are available to buyers.
events.unfinished_draft_desc: This incomplete event form has not been saved as a real draft event yet.
events.registry_desc: Search launches and update their status.
events.no_match: No events match the current view.
events.no_match_desc: Adjust the search or create a new event.

event_create.subtitle_placeholder: A premium electronic pop night in Saigon.
event_create.choose_venue_prompt: Choose a venue to generate ticket releases and preview the layout.

event_create.autosave_convert_warning: Event saved, but the autosave draft could not be marked as converted

users.desc: Manage accounts, roles, and recent access activity.
users.no_match: No users match the current view.

venues.create_desc: Add the venue details first. Configure sections, rows, and seats in Venue Studio after creation.

venues.description_placeholder: A room tuned for premium lines of sight.

event_session.title: Event sessions
event_session.desc: Configure the dates, demand controls, and ticket releases buyers can book.
event_session.empty_desc: Add one session to define when this event can be booked.
event_session.session_controls: Session {index} controls its own schedule, access pacing, and prices.
event_session.schedule_desc: Set the public session name and time window.
event_session.label: Label
event_session.sales_window_desc: Bookings are only accepted during this range.
event_session.no_releases_desc: Add at least one ticket release before publishing.

seats.selection_summary_desc: Choose up to 10 seats, then continue straight to checkout.
seats.reserved_for_checkout: Reserved for checkout after you continue.

admin_event_pricing.changes_note: Changes apply to every session listed above.

saved_attendees.subtitle: Manage profiles for quicker checkout when buying tickets for yourself and others.
